name: Desert Storm Gardnerville
description: Come play pickleball at Desert Storm Gardnerville in Gardnerville, NV! There are 8 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to locker rooms, restrooms, water, and wheelchair accessibility. The courts are free. You can’t reserve the courts.

name: Gardnerville Douglas County Community & Senior Center
description: Gardnerville Douglas County Community & Senior Center is a place to play pickleball in Gardnerville, NV. There are 12 wood courts. 4 are indoors and 8 are outdoors. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A one-time fee is required to play. The facility includes amenities like food, locker rooms, restrooms, water, and trainers or lessons.

name: Johnson Lane Park
description: Johnson Lane Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Minden, NV. There are 2 outdoor courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. The courts are free.

name: Kahle Community Center
description: Kahle Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Stateline, NV. There are 4 concrete courts. 2 are indoors and 2 are outdoors. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free. The facility includes amenities like restrooms and water.
open_play_schedule: Indoor open Monday Wednesday and Friday

name: Lampe Park
description: Lampe Park is a place to play pickleball in Gardnerville, NV. There are 4 outdoor hard courts. The lines are overlaid on a tennis court, so the net is a little taller than a normal pickleball net. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free. The courts cannot be reserved.

name: Mitch Park
description: Permanent lines on a basketball court. One porta-potty.
